title: Math Block
description: PAD geometry block for grounding a sensor in octahedral state encoding. Added to sensors by scripts/apply_math_blocks.py or manually when creating new sensors.

pad.description: Pleasure-Arousal-Dominance coordinates. P/A biologically anchored (amygdala, SNS). D from polyvagal theory.

A.description: Arousal/activation. Positive = SNS active. Negative = calm/depleted.

D.description: Dominance/agency. Positive = in control. Negative = helpless. Cultural overlay affects D only.

source.description: How the PAD was determined. 'exact' = matched to known centroid. 'inferred' = keyword analysis.

octahedral_state.description: One of 8 geometric states derived from PAD coordinates.

bits.description: 3-bit encoding with octahedral marker. e.g. '000|O' for ground state.

label.description: Human-readable label for the state geometry.

phi_coherence.description: Deviation from Fibonacci eigenvalue ratios. Higher = more stable. 0.97 = ground state. 0.70 = ambiguous.

ontology_bridge.description: Which Rosetta Shape Core ontology family this state maps to.

family_id.description: Rosetta family or principle ID. e.g. 'FAMILY.F01' or 'PRINCIPLE.P06'.
